reviews.review_description:
I got this a few months ago and only just tried it out at the end of September 2025. 

Its pretty well done and quite fun to start with, but with no jeopardy, high scores, waves or anything, it isn't a game to engage with for that long at the moment unfortunately. After a while I stopped shooting and exspected the wasps to swarm and sting me to death. Two of them buzzed about a bit and I quit the game. Nothing else happened. 

Adding at least a way to keep score and try and beat your highest, some levels or some other way to gauge progress would help so much. 

Hopefully the game is updated, if so and you let me know, I will be happy to try it again.
